message:
feat(heredoc): add quote-aware heredoc operator detection

Improve heredoc detection with quote-aware scanning to reduce false
positives. The scanner now correctly identifies heredoc operators
outside of quoted contexts while avoiding triggers inside commit
messages, search patterns, and other string literals.

Changes:
- Add quote-aware heredoc operator scanner using memchr
- Restructure trigger patterns for better organization
- Improve hook output formatting
- Add CLI improvements for pack documentation generation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
